title: The Francophone Immigration Support Program of the Centre for Innovation in Francophone Immigration  - Canada.ca
content:
## The Francophone Immigration Support Program of the Centre for Innovation in Francophone Immigration
The Centre for Innovation in Francophone Immigration (CIFI) is launching a new grants and contributions program
    called the Francophone Immigration Support Program (FISP). Make sure you visit these pages regularly for any updates, corrections or key messages about the FISP.
